MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Sep-17-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Henry W. Roux, Esq. of CLAYTON & MCEVOY 408/293-9100, X-304, for respondent Systan, Inc., moving for change of venue (to Santa Clara County)
David J. Heilman, Esq., 434-9114, for petitoner and did not oppose to the motion

RULING:
Parties submitted to the Court's 8/11/03 ruling -- Case transferred to Santa Clara County Superior Court on Court's own motion. The Court vacated its tentative ruling and granted RESPONDENT SYSTAN INC.'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (301/JLW/JU) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
